name: From Geneva or Geneva Airport: Transfer to Basel, Bern, Lucerne or Zurich
description: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: Transfer to Basel, Bern, Lucerne or Zurich in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: Transfer to Basel, Bern, Lucerne or Zurich in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Transfer
subcategory.description: Book a transfer and get to your destination comfortably. A transfer is made by car or bus between two places. Very often it is a transfer from or to the airport. For bookable transfers, the starting point or destination is usually fixed (for example, the airport in Geneva). For the opposite, a city or place is fixed. Private transfers ensure you and your fellow travelers a comfortable ride to the destination

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Basel: picturesque waterfront promenade with bridge, trees, and calm water in the city during summer
Lucerne: Picturesque view of the city by the lake with historic buildings and mountains in the background.
Zurich: Picturesque cityscape by the water, with historic buildings and green hills in summer.
Bern: View of the city with green trees and the Aare. Historical buildings and nature combined.
